name: Moodie
description:
**First Appearance:** Chapter 43; Episode 20

Moodie is a woman who Fullbody had taken to the Baratie. Sanji tried to seduce her, which made Fullbody angry and jealous. Moodie tried to calm him down, but she did not succeed in doing so. She was never seen again. 

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
